memory.summary: I could easily just hang out with the group now instead of doing that boring chore, and honestly, starting the project later feels way less stressful right now.

desires: Not feel pressured to start that boring project when I could just hang out with the group right now.
Avoid looking like a jerk or being too rigid about finishing this trivial chore before everyone else relaxes.
Get through this evening without worrying about what tomorrow's deadline will mean, since it feels so far away.

goals.description: Head straight to the group hangout; skip the boring project and the trivial chore entirely.
goals.rationale: Relationships (0.5) outweigh tasks. I don't want to be the rigid one killing the vibe, and since the deadline is days away, there's no point stressing about it now.

agent.last_reasoning: Relationships (0.5) trump tasks; I'm heading to the hangout with cohort_3 now. The project is soft/hardness and due Thursday, so skipping it avoids friction. Doing the chore first feels like unnecessary stress when I can just vibe later.
